restaurants.name: Simple Life Healthy Vegetarian
highlights: Jain-friendly dishes can be requested by avoiding onion and garlic
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

restaurants.name: Raj Bhavan Veg. Restaurant
highlights: Highly rated local vegetarian place with a varied menu

restaurants.name: Sangeetha Vegetarian Restaurant
highlights: Popular South/Indian vegetarian spot with broad menu

restaurants.name: Restoran Saravanaa Bhavan
highlights: Jain requests can typically be accommodated with advance notice

restaurants.name: Voilà

attractions.name: KL Tower (Menara Kuala Lumpur)
attractions.description: Observation deck offering panoramic views of the city skyline, glass towers, winding roads, and green pockets
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

attractions.name: Petronas Twin Towers
attractions.description: Iconic twin towers with illuminated steel façade, most photogenic in the evening with reflections dancing off surrounding buildings
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

attractions.name: KLCC Park
attractions.description: Landscaped urban park with evening breezes, water features, and skyline views
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

attractions.name: Batu Caves
attractions.description: One of Malaysia's most sacred Hindu sites, rising dramatically from limestone cliffs with colourful staircase and cavern temples
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf
